GG0130H1_FTWR_STRT_CD GG0130H1 Self Care: Footwear Ability at SOC/ROC Indicates the patient's ability to put on and take off footwear at the start ofcare/resumption of care. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only
